hero.headline: Sarasota's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: For 22 years, On-Time Pool Service has kept Sarasota pools crystal clear so families can focus on making memories. Licensed, award-winning, and backed by 532+ five-star reviews — we show up on time, every time.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Weekly Cleaning to Full Renovation
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a weekly tune-up or a complete transformation, our licensed technicians have done it all for over two decades across Sarasota.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, filter cleaning, and full equipment checks — your pool stays swim-ready every single week, guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Variable-speed pumps, filters, salt systems, heaters, and timers — we diagnose fast and fix it right. Most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae took over? We perform a thorough assessment and execute a custom restoration plan to bring your pool back to pristine in days.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Control your pumps, heater, and lights from your phone. We install and configure smart automation systems for effortless pool ownership.

cards.title: Renovation & Resurfacing
cards.description: Resurface worn plaster, install custom tile, add pavers, and upgrade to energy-efficient equipment. We breathe new life into aging pools.

cards.title: Saltwater Conversions
cards.description: Enjoy softer, gentler water with a professional saltwater chlorinator installation. Less chemical handling, more comfortable swimming.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll inspect your pool, discuss your needs, and provide an honest quote — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Show Up On Time
steps.description: Our licensed, background-checked technicians arrive when scheduled. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment — we handle every detail so you don't have to.

steps.title: Dive Into Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, healthy, and swim-ready all year. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — that's our promise.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts On-Time
about.headline: 22 Years of Showing Up — On Time, Every Time
about.description: Founded in 2004, On-Time Pool Service was built on a simple idea: pool owners deserve reliability they can count on. Today, we're Sarasota's highest-rated pool company with over 532 five-star reviews, three consecutive Herald Tribune Readers' Choice awards, and an A+ BBB rating. Every technician on our team is licensed, trained, and committed to our five values: Respect, Integrity, Communication, Quality, and Adaptability.
about.badge: FSPA Service Pro of the Year

features.title: Licensed & Certified Contractors
features.description: State-licensed pool contractor (CPC#1459543) and LP Gas installer. Every job meets or exceeds Florida's highest professional standards.

features.title: Award-Winning Reputation
features.description: Three-time Herald Tribune Readers' Choice winner, BBB A+ rated, and Florida Swimming Pool Association Service Professional of the Year.

features.title: Full-Service, One Company
features.description: From weekly cleaning to complete pool renovations and smart automation — one trusted team handles everything your pool needs.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is unique. Request your free assessment and we'll provide clear, upfront pricing tailored to your pool's needs.

guarantee.headline: Our "On-Time or It's Free" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If we ever miss your scheduled service window without notice, your next visit is on us. And if you're not 100% satisfied with any service, we come back and redo it at no charge. That's the On-Time promise — we've been keeping it for 22 years.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Call us at 941-224-0404 and we'll find the earliest opening.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. On-Time Pool Service holds a state pool contractor license (CPC#1459543) and LP Gas installer license. All technicians are background-checked, trained, and carry full liability insurance for your protection.

faqs.question: What areas in Sarasota do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, Longboat Key, Lido Key, Palmer Ranch, The Meadows, University Park, Bradenton, Venice, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool renovation services?
faqs.answer: Yes — we handle everything from resurfacing and custom tile work to paver installation, energy-efficient equipment upgrades, and full pool automation. We'll transform your aging pool into the backyard centerpiece it deserves to be.

faqs.question: What makes On-Time different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Twenty-two years of proven reliability, 532+ five-star Google reviews, three Herald Tribune Readers' Choice awards, and an A+ BBB rating. We're a state-licensed contractor — not a truck and a net. When we say on time, we mean it.

testimonials.name: Ross H.
testimonials.text: I love y'all! If you need a customer reference, give them my number! And ANDY is awesome. Best pool service we've ever had, hands down.

testimonials.name: Cheryl S.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool is just what it says — always on time. And excellent work. The pool looked gorgeous after their visit. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: Peter & Gary R.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool Service has been excellent. Reliable, efficient, and they keep the pool looking well maintained week after week. Highly recommend.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool assessment from Sarasota's highest-rated pool service. 22 years of on-time reliability — call today.
